name: Images Badge
summary: A folder badge component displaying fanned image thumbnails that expand and rotate on hover.
detailedDescription: Images Badge creates an interactive folder icon with up to 3 image thumbnails that fan out on hover. The folder uses amber gradient backgrounds (amber-400 to 500 light, 500 to 600 dark) with a tab at top-left (37.5% width, 25% height). Images are positioned in staggered stack, translating upward (-35px default) and spreading horizontally (±20px) with rotation (±15deg) on hover. The component uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions, with configurable dimensions for folder (32x24px default), teaser images (20x14px), and hover images (48x32px). Perspective (1000px) and preserve-3d transform create depth effect. Component can be div or anchor tag based on href prop, with target and rel attributes for external links. Text label displays beside folder. This creates engaging visual indicator for image galleries, photo collections, or media folders where preview thumbnails enhance click-through.
purpose: Display image collection preview in folder badge
Animate thumbnails fanning out on hover
Link to image galleries or collections
behavior: Shows up to 3 stacked image thumbnails
Rotates images outward for fan effect
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
